title: rutidea olenotricha
intro: Rutidea olenotricha, also known as the Olenotricha Rutidea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rutidea olenotricha include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling its leaves in water to harness its medicinal properties.
